arts.ttl: 16 players that could miss Tottenham vs Man United after huge new injury blow confirmed
arts.sum: "Some of the lads who have been out for quite a while look like they’re in a good place now," Postecoglou told Tottenham's official website earlier this week. "In the last 10 days he’s integrated back into the team and is fully into training, so he’s in a good place and that means he becomes available for us.”

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim facing midfield dilemma as Man United injury crisis emerges for Tottenham clash
arts.sum: Just eight senior players could be absent for the visit of United with Postecoglou revealing a triple injury return may arrive: "Some of the lads who have been out for quite a while look like they’re in a good place now, Vic [Guglielmo Vicario] is probably the one who has come back ahead of schedule," he told Tottenham's official website . In the last 10 days he’s integrated back into the team and is fully into training, so he’s in a good place and that means he becomes available for us.”

arts.ttl: Tottenham stars fighting for futures as problem position requires transfer reboot
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur's midfield has become a real issue for Ange Postecoglou this season and the Aussie's persistent rotation proves it's an area that requires notable surgery in the summer transfer window
